_comment: Fail-closed Box scope guard. Every Box CLI, REST, SDK, or tools/box operation must stay within test folder 392761581105 and tracked descendants (read+write). readOnlyRoots (operator decision 2026-07-16: the production archive root 4077648161) additionally allow READ-ONLY operations only — CLI action chains ending in get/list/items/download, REST GETs with no body; every write verb stays denied. Folder 0 is always denied. Configuration keys, mode, and root are fixed. Production writes require TKT-178's separately reviewed signed-run exact-object executor.
